ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alert_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert template */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the alert template */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event related to the alert */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes regarding the alert template */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the template (e.g., draft, active, retired) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_templates_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_templates_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., meteorological, geophysical) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident type (e.g., meteorological, geophysical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_incident_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert template */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "template_version" INTEGER /* Version of the template associated with the incident */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_incident_mapping_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_incident_mapping_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES alert_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert template */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, retired) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES alert_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert template being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the template */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the template */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES alert_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
